## Validation

- [ ] Build passes.
- [ ] Relevant tests were added or updated.
- [ ] Relevant tests pass.
- [ ] Analyzer/formatting results were reviewed.

## Review Checklist

- [ ] Change is small and scoped to the requested behavior.
- [ ] No unrelated rewrite or mass formatting.
- [ ] Public contracts are unchanged or intentionally changed and documented.
- [ ] `AGENTS.md` and repository coding standards were followed.
- [ ] Complexity, file size, method size, and parameter count are reasonable.
- [ ] SOLID, GRASP, KISS, YAGNI, and Law of Demeter concerns were considered.
- [ ] Async code accepts and propagates cancellation where practical.
- [ ] Logging is structured and does not expose secrets or sensitive data.
- [ ] Security, validation, authorization, telemetry, and error-handling patterns are preserved.
